one_time_description: St'at'imc (PC) 2011 Trust distribution recognized as revenue in 2023
economic_notes: Skatin Nations has a limited partnership interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership not recorded in financial statements due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence. Also holds interests in BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, 1020376 BC Ltd. (33.3%), and Skatin Nations Treaty Resource Inc. (100%). Logging income of $228,254 recorded. ISC funding represents 55% of total revenue (down from 70% in 2022).
notes: Audit qualified due to unrecorded limited partnership interest in Tsetspa7 Forestry Limited Partnership. Prior year restated to reclassify Replacement Reserve Fund from accumulated surplus to financial liabilities. Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages ($259,242) and Bank of Montreal demand loans ($5,654,619) totalling $5,913,861. Buildings under construction of $4,474,774 is a significant portion of TCA. Proceeds from long-term debt of $259,912 transferred to deferred revenue and excluded from annual surplus. No schedule of remuneration provided. Prior year audited by a different firm which also issued a qualified opinion.
